grainscape 1.0.0
  • Reference
    • Modelling, visualization and analysis with the `grainscape` package
    • Calculating the minimum planar graph
  • Changelog

CRAN submission checklist

Source: cran-submission.md

  1. ensure all tests pass locally on as many machines as possible (mac, linux, win)

    devtools::check(args = c("--as-cran"), build_args = c("--compact-vignettes=both"))

    Extended (vdiffr) tests: the visual-regression plot tests in tests/testthat/test-plot.R are gated with skip_on_cran() and skip_on_ci(), so both CRAN and CI (R CMD check on GitHub Actions) skip them. Their SVG snapshots are renderer-sensitive (svglite/freetype/ggplot2 versions) and only match a controlled local environment, so they run only locally, as a maintainer regression tool:

    devtools::test() ## runs the vdiffr plot tests locally (requires CI != "true")

    Review any flagged plot diffs with testthat::snapshot_review("plot/") (or vdiffr::manage_cases()); accept intended changes with testthat::snapshot_accept("plot").

  2. ensure passing on GitHub Actions

    • https://github.com/achubaty/grainscape/actions

  3. format the package

    # https://posit-dev.github.io/air/
air format .

  4. ensure passing on additional platforms

    ## macOS
devtools::check_mac_release(args = "--compact-vignettes=both")

## Windows (win-builder: oldrelease, release, devel)
devtools::check_win_oldrelease(args = "--compact-vignettes=both")
devtools::check_win_release(args = "--compact-vignettes=both")
devtools::check_win_devel(args = "--compact-vignettes=both")

    For broader coverage, run the R-hub workflow on GitHub Actions (Actions → “R-hub” → “Run workflow”), or locally via rhub::rhub_check() after a one-time rhub::rhub_setup().

  5. bump version number in DESCRIPTION (use non-devel suffix – no .9000)

    usethis::use_version() ## e.g., usethis::use_version("minor")

  6. update NEWS.md

    devtools::show_news()

  7. rebuild docs (vignettes are compacted automatically via --compact-vignettes=both)

    devtools::document()

  8. run spell checks

    spelling::spell_check_package()
spelling::update_wordlist()

  9. run reverse dependency checks (see revdep/check.R)

  10. update cran-comments.md (incl. versions tested)

  11. switch to main branch and merge in development

  12. remove Remotes from DESCRIPTION (on main branch), if present

  13. submit to CRAN

    devtools::release(args = "--compact-vignettes=both")

  14. once accepted, create a new GitHub release:

    usethis::use_github_release()

Developed by Paul Galpern, Sam Doctolero, Alex M Chubaty.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
